description_wiki: James Dow Constantine (born November 15, 1961) is an American lawyer, urban planner, and politician who is the chief executive officer of Sound Transit.

description: legislative body of the city of Seattle, Washington
description_wiki: The Seattle City Council is the legislative body of the city of Seattle, Washington.

description: county in the state of Washington, United States
description_wiki: King County is a county located in the U.S. state of Washington.

entity: American Federation of State, County and Municipal Employees
aliases: Amalgamated Association of Street and Electric Railway Employees
Amalgamated Association of Street Railway Employees of America
description_wiki: The Amalgamated Transit Union (ATU) is a labor organization in the United States and Canada that represents employees in the public transit industry.

description: city in and county seat of King County, State of Washington, United States
description_wiki: Seattle (  see-AT-əl) is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Washington and the Pacific Northwest region of North America.

description: city in and county seat of Spokane County, Washington, United States
description_wiki: Spokane (  spoh-KAN; Spokane: sƛ̓x̌etkʷ) is a city in and the county seat of Spokane County in the U.S. state of Washington.

The global COVID-19 pandemic (also known as the coronavirus pandemic), caused by severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2), began with an outbreak in Wuhan, China, in December 2019.
